title: The Ducky SMP
description: A lightweight client-side modpack with minimap navigation, proximity voice chat, land claims, and performance enhancements for The Ducky SMP server.
body:
This modpack contains all necessary client-side mods for The Ducky SMP server, providing enhanced navigation, communication, and quality-of-life features for multiplayer gameplay.

**Key Features:**

**Navigation & Mapping** - Xaero's Minimap and World Map provide comprehensive terrain visualization, waypoint management, and real-time player tracking to help you explore and navigate the world.

**Voice Communication** - Simple Voice Chat enables proximity-based voice communication, allowing you to talk with nearby players naturally without external applications.

**Land Protection** - Open Parties and Claims lets you protect your builds, create parties with friends, and manage shared territories with intuitive claim management.

**Performance Optimization** - Lithium improves game performance and reduces lag through server-side and client-side optimizations.

**Decorative Content** - Signed Paintings adds customizable artwork to personalize your builds with unique decorative options.

**Included Mods:**

Fabric API \[0.141.1+1.21.11\] by FabricMC 

Forge Config API Port \[21.11.1\] by Fuzs

Lithium \[0.21.2+mc1.21.11\] by JellySquid, 2No2Name

Open Parties and Claims \[0.25.8\] by Xaero96, other contributors

Signed Paintings \[1.2.8-mc1.21.11\] by Nettakrim

Simple Voice Chat \[1.21.11-2.6.11\] by Max Henkel

Xaero's Minimap \[25.3.5\] by xaero96 Xaero's

World Map \[1.40.6\] by xaero96
